channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Appeals court upholds dismissal of some charges against Trump, others in Georgia election case
item.description: A Georgia appeals court has upheld the dismissal of some of the charges against President-elect Donald Trump and others in the Georgia 2020 election interference case.
item.dc:creator: Kate Brumback, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Los Angeles fires have scorched largest urban area in California in at least 40 years
item.description: Two wildfires still burning in Los Angeles have torched more urban area than any other fire in the state since at least the mid-1980s.
item.dc:creator: Mary Katherine Wildeman And Christopher L. Keller, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Wisdom of a California grandmother, 90, goes viral amid Eaton Fire tragedy
item.description: A nearly 90-year-old California woman who lost her home to the Eaton Fire is going viral for pragmatism and positivity in the face of so much adversity.
item.dc:creator: Josh DuBose, KRON4

item.title: College students accused of online 'catch a predator' plot appear in court
item.description: Six Assumption University students were in court to face charges in a connection made between a Holyoke woman and a man on Tinder, which resulted in a TikTok plot to confront a falsely accused sexual predator.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Shook, Fox 5

item.title: Florida jury says CNN defamed Navy veteran in story about endangered Afghans
item.description: A jury in Panama City, Florida on Friday found that CNN defamed a U.S. Navy veteran in a 2021 story about people paid to rescue endangered Afghans following the Taliban takeover of the country.
item.dc:creator: David Bauder, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Top NJ watchdog official abruptly resigns, is removed from state voter rolls following residency flap
item.description: Tiffany Williams Brewer reportedly claimed a Maryland property as her principal residence, but later voted in New Jersey.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump wants one of the agents who covered him after he was shot to lead the Secret Service
item.description: FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla. (AP) — President-elect Donald Trump will choose to lead the U.S. Secret Service one of the agents who covered him after a gunmen opened fire at the candidate during a campaign rally in Pennsylvania. Donald Trump Jr.
item.dc:creator: ADRIANA GOMEZ LICON, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Feral swine to be removed from Land Between the Lakes
item.description: Feral swine, a non-native species, are not only threatening visitor safety and cultural sites, but are also digging up native plants.
item.dc:creator: Davis Nolan, NewsNation

item.title: Bruce Willis shakes hands with first responders in rare public appearance
item.description: Amid the devastating wildfires in Southern California, Bruce Willis took time to thank first responders.
item.dc:creator: Christine Samra, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Q&A: 'God Bless the USA' singer Lee Greenwood on Donald Trump's inauguration and Bibles
item.description: Forty years ago, Lee Greenwood released “God Bless the U.S.A.,” a patriotic anthem that has become a standard at political gatherings. He's performed the song for a number of presidents, including Ronald Reagan and George H. W. Bush.
item.dc:creator: THE ASSOCIATED PRESS, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Biden got an Oval Office letter from Trump and may leave one in the desk himself
item.description: Ronald Reagan probably didn't realize he was starting a tradition when he wrote a note congratulating his successor and left it in the Oval Office desk drawer after two terms as president.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Biden affirms Equal Rights Amendment is part of Constitution
item.description: President Joe Biden on Friday asserted that the Equal Rights Amendment (ERA), which prohibits discrimination on the basis of sex, is part of the Constitution, arguing it had met the criteria to be added as the 28th amendment.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Biden commutes the sentences of nearly 2,500 non-violent drug offenders
item.description: Biden said he is proud of his record on clemency and will “continue to review additional commutations and pardons” before he leaves office on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, WGN 9

item.title: Higher stakes stoke passions at DNC forum
item.description: With just over 2 weeks until the DNC chooses new officers, candidates for chair know stakes have been raised.
item.dc:creator: Jackie Koppell, NewsNation

item.title: Biden won't enforce TikTok ban, official says, leaving fate of app to Trump
item.description: President Joe Biden won't enforce a ban on the social media app TikTok that is set to take effect a day before he leaves office on Monday, a U.S. official said Thursday, leaving its fate in the hands of President-elect Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: FDA will allow Zyn nicotine pouches to stay on the market
item.description: Zyn products will be allowed to stay on the market after federal health officials said Thursday that the popular nicotine pouches can help adult smokers cut back or switch completely.
item.dc:creator: Nathaniel Weixel, KRON4

item.title: Arizona rancher suffering in Dems' border crisis says Trump DHS pick Noem should immediately do 4 things
item.description: An open border over the past four years has threatened Border Patrol agents and American communities alike as criminals took advantage of lax security.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Mud, debris slide splits hillside home that survived Palisades Fire in half
item.description: A hillside home overlooking the Pacific Ocean that survived the devastating Palisades Fire has split in half from a landslide directly behind the property.
item.dc:creator: Josh DuBose, KRON4

item.title: Fires scorched campuses across Los Angeles. Many schools are seeking places to hold classes
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Days after losing her home in the same fire that destroyed her Los Angeles elementary school, third-grader Gabriela Chevez-Muñoz resumed classes this week at another campus temporarily hosting children from her school.
item.dc:creator: KRYSTA FAURIA, JOCELYN GECKER and CLAIRE RUSH, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: California is years behind in implementing a law to make homes more fire resistant
item.description: SACRAMENTO, Calif. (AP) — Reeling from destructive wildfires, including the deadliest in California history, state lawmakers in 2020 passed new requirements for clearing combustible materials like dead plants and wooden furniture within 5 feet (1.5 meters) of homes in risky areas.
item.dc:creator: TRÂN NGUYỄN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Giuliani settles legal fight with former Georgia election workers and agrees to stop defaming them
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Rudy Giuliani reached a deal Thursday that lets the cash-strapped ex-New York City mayor keep his homes and belongings, including prized World Series rings, in exchange for unspecified compensation and a promise to never again speak ill of two former Georgia elections workers who won
item.dc:creator: LARRY NEUMEISTER and MICHAEL R. SISAK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: As Biden warns of an 'oligarchy,' Trump will be flanked by tech billionaires at his inauguration
item.description: President Joe Biden's pointed warning about the U.S. becoming an “ oligarchy ” of tech billionaires will be illustrated at Donald Trump's inauguration, when the world's three richest men will sit on the dais as Trump is sworn in for a second term.
item.dc:creator: NICHOLAS RICCARDI and ALI SWENSON, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: College students charged in TikTok-inspired 'catch a predator' plot appear in court
item.description: WORCESTER, Mass. (AP) — Five Massachusetts college students appeared in court Thursday, accused of plotting to lure a man to their campus through a dating app and then seizing him as part of a “Catch a Predator” trend on TikTok.
item.dc:creator: KATHY McCORMACK and PATRICK WHITTLE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: State Farm pulls Super Bowl commercial, shifts focus to supporting L.A. wildfire victims
item.description: State Farm has decided to pull its Super Bowl commercial and instead focus on supporting Los Angeles residents impacted by the deadly wildfires. “Our focus is firmly on providing support to the people of Los Angeles.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, KTLA 5

item.title: WATCH: Girls basketball coach accused of hitting person with car after argument
item.description: A girls' youth basketball coach is accused of hitting a person with his vehicle after an argument following a game Saturday in Columbia, according to state police, and it was caught on surveillance video.
item.dc:creator: Jenn Brink, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Jack Hoffman, the young cancer patient who ran for a famous 2013 touchdown, dies at 19
item.description: Jack Hoffman, the cancer patient who captured the hearts of Nebraska football fans and inspired the nation as a 7-year-old when he ran for a touchdown during the Cornhuskers' 2013 spring game, has died at the age of 19.
item.dc:creator: Eric Olson, KRON4

item.title: United Airlines flight returns to O'Hare after hitting coyote during takeoff
item.description: A United Airlines flight from Chicago to Phoenix had to return to O'Hare International Airport on Sunday morning after its landing gear struck a coyote during takeoff.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Illers, ABC 4

item.title: Florida grandmother who left infant in hot car found not guilty of manslaughter
item.description: A Florida grandmother was acquitted of manslaughter in the death of her 7-month-old granddaughter, but was convicted on a lesser charge.
item.dc:creator: Staci DaSilva, ABC 4

item.title: Southwest pilot arrested for suspected DUI at Georgia airport
item.description: A Southwest flight was delayed for five hours Wednesday morning due to a pilot being arrested and charged with DUI, officials said.
item.dc:creator: Natasha Young, KRON4

item.title: Craft retailer JOANN files for bankruptcy
item.description: Craft retailer JOANN filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy on Wednesday morning, marking the second time the company has done so in a year.
item.dc:creator: Joshua Hallenbeck, Fox 5

item.title: Officials tout Gaza ceasefire, hostage deal as Israel says details still in flux
item.description: Israel and Hamas agreed to pause the devastating war in the Gaza Strip, mediators announced Wednesday, raising the possibility of winding down the deadliest and most destructive fighting between the bitter enemies.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Biden warns of dangers of 'oligarchy' of ultra-rich, 'tech-industrial complex' running country
item.description: President Joe Biden will deliver his farewell address to the nation on Wednesday, days before President-elect Donald Trump returns to the White House.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Flags ordered to fly at full-staff on Inauguration Day in multiple states
item.description: GOP governors of at least eight states ordered flags to be flown at full-staff on Inauguration Day, bucking tradition by raising flags before the end of a customary 30-day mourning period following the death of former President Jimmy Carter.
item.dc:creator: Brooke Migdon, Fox 5

item.title: Michigan Gov. Gretchen Whitmer, a potential 2028 candidate, wants to find common ground with Trump
item.description: LANSING, Mich. (AP) — Michigan Gov. Gretchen Whitmer wants a fresh start with President-elect Donald Trump but also warns that she won't back down over tariffs that she believes would hurt the auto industry in her state.
item.dc:creator: JOEY CAPPELLETTI and ISABELLA VOLMERT, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Fire tornadoes a risk under California's extreme wildfire conditions
item.description: As if they aren’t already facing enough, firefighters in California also could encounter a rare but dangerous phenomenon in which wildfires create their own weather.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Dire fire warning for LA area pushed back as winds ease
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Easing winds delivered a brief but much-needed reprieve to firefighters Tuesday as they battled two massive blazes burning in the Los Angeles area, and the National Weather Service pushed back its unusually dire warning of critical fire weather until early the following day.
item.dc:creator: JAIMIE DING and JULIE WATSON and JOHN SEEWER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: How to save TikTok videos before the potential ban goes into effect
item.description: The deadline for a potential TikTok ban in the U.S. is fast approaching and many of the app's users are already taking steps to prepare, even as its fate remains uncertain.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5
